content.text: Now I have all the context I need. Let me create all files in parallel.

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<databaseChangeLog xmlns="http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog"
                   xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
                   xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog
                   http://www.liquibase.org/xml/ns/dbchangelog/dbchangelog-latest.xsd">

    <changeSet id="008-1" author="luobeilin">
        <addColumn tableName="collabspace_space_node">
            <column name="visibility_tag" type="tinyint" defaultValueNumeric="0" remarks="系统标签：0=无, 1=公开, 2=私有">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
        </addColumn>
    </changeSet>

    <changeSet id="008-2" author="luobeilin">
        <createTable tableName="collabspace_space_node_tag" remarks="个人标签定义表">
            <column name="id" type="bigint" remarks="Primary Key">
                <constraints primaryKey="true" nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="space_id" type="varchar(255)" remarks="空间站ID">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="name" type="varchar(50)" remarks="标签名称">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="color" type="varchar(20)" remarks="颜色值">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="user_id" type="bigint" remarks="所属用户">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="sort_order" type="int" defaultValueNumeric="0" remarks="排序权重">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="created_at" type="timestamp" defaultValueComputed="CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" remarks="创建时间">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="updated_at" type="timestamp" defaultValueComputed="CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" remarks="更新时间">
                <constraints nullable="true"/>
            </column>
            <column name="created_by" type="varchar(255)" remarks="创建人">
                <constraints nullable="true"/>
            </column>
            <column name="updated_by" type="varchar(255)" remarks="更新人">
                <constraints nullable="true"/>
            </column>
            <column name="is_deleted" type="tinyint unsigned" defaultValueNumeric="0" remarks="逻辑删除 0:否 1:是">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
        </createTable>
        <createIndex tableName="collabspace_space_node_tag" indexName="idx_tag_space_user">
            <column name="space_id"/>
            <column name="user_id"/>
        </createIndex>
    </changeSet>

    <changeSet id="008-3" author="luobeilin">
        <createTable tableName="collabspace_space_node_tag_rel" remarks="节点-标签关联表">
            <column name="id" type="bigint" remarks="Primary Key">
                <constraints primaryKey="true" nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="space_node_id" type="bigint" remarks="节点ID">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="tag_id" type="bigint" remarks="标签ID">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="user_id" type="bigint" remarks="用户ID">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="created_at" type="timestamp" defaultValueComputed="CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" remarks="创建时间">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
            <column name="created_by" type="varchar(255)" remarks="创建人">
                <constraints nullable="true"/>
            </column>
            <column name="updated_at" type="timestamp" defaultValueComputed="CURRENT_TIMESTAMP" remarks="更新时间">
                <constraints nullable="true"/>
            </column>
            <column name="updated_by" type="varchar(255)" remarks="更新人">
                <constraints nullable="true"/>
            </column>
            <column name="is_deleted" type="tinyint unsigned" defaultValueNumeric="0" remarks="逻辑删除 0:否 1:是">
                <constraints nullable="false"/>
            </column>
        </createTable>
        <createIndex tableName="collabspace_space_node_tag_rel" indexName="idx_rel_space_node_id">
            <column name="space_node_id"/>
        </createIndex>
        <createIndex tableName="collabspace_space_node_tag_rel" indexName="idx_rel_tag_id">
            <column name="tag_id"/>
        </createIndex>
        <createIndex tableName="collabspace_space_node_tag_rel" indexName="idx_rel_user_id">
            <column name="user_id"/>
        </createIndex>
    </changeSet>

</databaseChangeLog>

content.text:
全部 4 个任务完成，4 个独立提交都已落地。

---

**本次改动总结：**

**Task 1 - Liquibase 迁移（008_space_node_tag.xml）**
- `008-1`：给 `collabspace_space_node` 加 `visibility_tag` 列（tinyint，默认 0）
- `008-2`：新建 `collabspace_space_node_tag` 个人标签定义表，含联合索引 `(space_id, user_id)`
- `008-3`：新建 `collabspace_space_node_tag_rel` 关联表，含三个单列索引
- 注册进 `db.changelog-master.xml`

**Task 2 - 枚举 + 实体**
- `SpaceNodeVisibilityTagEnum`：NONE/PUBLIC/PRIVATE，用 `@EnumValue` 标记
- `SpaceNodeTagEntity` / `SpaceNodeTagRelEntity`：继承 BaseEntity，`@SuperBuilder` + `@TableName(keepGlobalPrefix=true)`
- `SpaceNodeEntity` 新增 `visibilityTag` 字段

**Task 3 - Mapper + Service**
- `SpaceNodeTagMapper` / `SpaceNodeTagRelMapper`：继承 `BaseMapper`
- `ISpaceNodeTagService` / `ISpaceNodeTagRelService`：接口定义查询方法
- `ISpaceNodeTagServiceImpl` / `ISpaceNodeTagRelServiceImpl`：`ServiceImpl` 实现，包含空集合短路保护

**Task 4 - RO + VO + 异常码**
- 6 个 RO 类：`CreateTagRo`、`UpdateTagRo`、`BindTagRo`、`UnbindTagRo`、`SetVisibilityTagRo`、`TagNodeQueryRo`
- `SpaceNodeTagVo`：id 用 `ToStringSerializer` 防精度丢失
- `SpaceNodeException` 新增异常码 620-624
- `SpaceNodeVo` 新增 `visibilityTag` 和 `tags` 字段，补充 `List` import
